title: elytrigia striatula
intro: Elytrigia striatula, also known as Elymus striatus or striated wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elytrigia striatula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Elytrigia striatula can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
